Class ChromaApi

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chroma.vectorstore.ChromaApi
public class ChromaApi extends Object
Single-class Chroma API implementation based on the (unofficial) Chroma REST API.
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Eddú Meléndez, Jonghoon Park

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.AddEmbeddingsRequest
    Add embeddings to the chroma data store.
    static final class 
    ChromaApi.Builder
     
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.Collection
    Chroma embedding collection.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.CreateCollectionRequest
    Request to create a new collection with the given name and metadata.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.CreateDatabaseRequest
    Request to create a new database
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.CreateTenantRequest
    Request to create a new tenant
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.Database
    Chroma database.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.DeleteEmbeddingsRequest
    Request to delete embedding from a collection.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.Embedding
    Single query embedding response.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.GetEmbeddingResponse
    Object containing the get embedding results.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.GetEmbeddingsRequest
    Get embeddings from a collection.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.QueryRequest
    Request to get the nResults nearest neighbor embeddings for provided queryEmbeddings.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.QueryResponse
    A QueryResponse object containing the query results.
    static final record 
    ChromaApi.Tenant
    Chroma tenant.

    • ChromaApi

      public ChromaApi(String baseUrl, org.springframework.web.client.RestClient.Builder restClientBuilder, tools.jackson.databind.json.JsonMapper jsonMapper)

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static ChromaApi.Builder builder()

    • withKeyToken

      public ChromaApi withKeyToken(String keyToken)
      Configure access to ChromaDB secured with static API Token Authentication: https://docs.trychroma.com/usage-guide#static-api-token-authentication
      Parameters:
      keyToken - Chroma static API Token Authentication. (Optional)

    • withBasicAuthCredentials

      public ChromaApi withBasicAuthCredentials(String username, String password)
      Configure access to ChromaDB secured with Basic Authentication: https://docs.trychroma.com/usage-guide#basic-authentication
      Parameters:
      username - Credentials username.
      password - Credentials password.

      public void deleteDatabase(String tenantName, String databaseName)
      Delete a database with the given name.
      Parameters:
      tenantName - the name of the tenant to delete.
      databaseName - the name of the database to delete.
